title: ChannelOutput
description: Output of the Channel Agent — the authority where a complaint should be filed.

primary_channel.description: Name of the primary authority to file the complaint with.

secondary_channel.description: Name of the fallback authority if the primary does not resolve the case.

channel_url.description: Official URL of the primary authority's complaints portal.

explanation.description: 1–2 sentences in plain Spanish explaining where to file and why.

filing_method.description: Whether the complaint can be filed in-person, online, or both.

estimated_response_days.description: Estimated working days for the authority to respond.
